sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n53078" key="kanhtopoio/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">κᾰνητοποιός</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, <sense id="n53078.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">maker of reed-mats</tr_>, prob. in <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0233.tlg001:116" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Hippon.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">116</biblScope></bibl>, cf. <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0542.tlg001:10:184" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Poll.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">10.184</biblScope> </bibl> (<foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">καννηνο-</foreign> cod.).</sense> </entryFree>
